tools.name: inkflow_quote
tools.description: Firm price quote for a writing job WITHOUT ordering. 3x-margin fixed pricing; quotes honoured for 24h.

tools.name: inkflow_order
tools.description: Place a paid order for a complete book, manual, technical spec, or multi-volume series. Returns a Stripe payment URL — writing starts automatically the moment payment clears, with per-chapter progress via inkflow_job_status and webhooks. tools.name: inkflow_job_status
tools.description: Live status of an order: chapters written, QA phase, delivery links when complete.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "inkflow_order" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
